text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Fan Fest, where the students put on
various events and interact with their fans.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
We've completed our security check of the area,
Your Highness. There are no immediate concerns,
so we'll remain on standby around the perimeter.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much. But... is this really okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Normally, there's no way they would let Fine
Motion take part in an event like this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her popularity continues to grow after the
accomplishments of her classic year. In an event
packed with fans like this, her safety can't be
guaranteed. But...

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
You're saying that you wish for Her Highness to
participate no matter what?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A short time back, I spoke to her security captain
directly in the hopes of getting permission for
Fine Motion to participate. For her sake, I
thought it was absolutely necessary.
choice_data_list: I don't want her to get used to being lonely.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
I respect Her Highness from the bottom of my
heart. That's why I follow her wishes. Which is
why...

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
I'll try to convince our security HQ. Can I count
on your cooperation?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It turned out my "cooperation" meant negotiating
with their headquarters as a representative of the
academy. Luckily, we were able to get permission.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You must have worked very diligently on my
behalf, Trainer. You have my thanks.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: And you as well, Captain. Good work.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
My role is to safeguard your academy life, Your
Highness. As such, my pride will not allow me to
let you miss out on participating.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe, is that right? I'm truly grateful to you both.

text_block_list.name: Academy Announcement
text_block_list.text:
Our next contest is the Running Quiz!
Participating students, please head to the
assigned area.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's about to begin! I'll be off, then!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion!
Good luck!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the Running Quiz begins amid the
raucous cheers of the fans.

text_block_list.name: Event Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion is in first place without a single
mistake so far! Now, for your final question!

text_block_list.name: Event Announcer
text_block_list.text:
There's a song from a famous musical that begins
with the word "doe." What does that "doe" mean
in English?

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
Oh, an English question!
That's a gimme!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...Doe.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Do-re-miii-re-do, do-re-mi-re-do-reee! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ah, I've bungled it.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
So, uh... She was totally just singing that ramen
tune, right?!

text_block_list.name: Event Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Umm, actually... that is completely incorrect. Bad
luck!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha. I just started singing that song without
realizing. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion marches to the beat of her own
drum, huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While she may have got the answer wrong, Fine
Motion certainly succeeded in creating a buzz
among the crowd.

text_block_list.name: Event Announcer
text_block_list.text:
There's a ramen shop located at the north exit of
the station called Raging Storm. Where did the
owner fir—

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: The answer is Ikebukuro!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Holy cow!
She didn't even hear the whole question!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The rest of the question was likely, "Where did
the owner first learn his craft?"

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Originally, he trained at two shops: Stormy Soup
and Raging Ramen.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
He mainly learned the ins and outs of
management at Stormy Soup and how to cook
ramen at Raging Ramen. Therefore, the correct
answer is Ikebukuro!

text_block_list.name: Event Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Spot on! Fine Motion nailed it! That was a really
tough question made to trip up even die-hard
ramen lovers, and you made it seem easy!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The names of the shops also provided a hint! He
took "raging" from one and "storm" from the
other! ♪

text_block_list.name: Self-proclaimed Ramen Expert
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion is a force to be reckoned with—her
love and knowledge of ramen both run deep...
Could she be the next Commodore Perry come to
shake up the ramen world?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion did a great job at the quiz,
thoroughly entertaining the crowd!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Whew! I'm so hot! It was just a light jog!
choice_data_list: Maybe because the fans are so fired up.
Maybe because the fans are so fired up.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Yes, they certainly are...

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
Gooo, Fine Motion!
Yeah, Fine!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! You can do it, Fine!
Go for it!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I could hear them calling my name so much more
clearly than before.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...But why do they cheer for me so eagerly?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: You mean...

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text: U-um! Do you have a moment?

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text: I... want to thank you!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: But why?

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text:
It's because you make running look so fun! Thank
you for that!

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text:
I never even considered that you could have fun
racing. I thought that was something only the
most skilled racers were allowed to do.

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text:
But when I watch you run, it's like something
inside me has been set free.

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text:
I see you and I think it looks so nice—like racing
must be so fun.

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text:
I want to run just like you. It's like I've been struck
by inspiration!

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text:
I'm not very good yet, but I want to run as
powerfully and beautifully as you one day!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...It's peculiar. All I've been doing is having fun.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It's like I'm living in a delightful dream. And like
any dream, this time will surely end. Which is why
I want to enjoy my time here to the fullest.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: That's all it is. And yet, the fans call out my name.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: And there are those who wish to run as I do...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I've begun to wish that I could stay here forever. I
want to continue racing long, long after I've
crossed my finish line.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Even though I know there's no such thing as
forever.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I won't find myself here again...
choice_data_list:
The end comes for everyone, no matter who you
are.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I know that. That's why—
choice_data_list: That doesn't mean you'll lose everything.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the young Umamusume demonstrated just now
in the way she looks up to Fine Motion, feelings
linger and memories live on in people's hearts.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
How can you say so with such confidence? I'm
certain everyone will forget all about me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Just as the scent of perfume fades away. Am I the
only one who will carry these memories?
choice_data_list:
You just need to become a pillar of everyone's
heart.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That duty... is to become a pillar of Ireland's
prosperity.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
There are certain concessions required of my
heart... but a pillar I shall become.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have no doubt that's important to her. However,
these concessions are also there to protect her
from having to sacrifice her feelings.
choice_data_list: Become a pillar of the Twinkle Series...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She can be a role model that runners in the
Twinkle Series will always look up to... someone
who inspires such fervent memories the fans pass
down the stories for generations!
choice_data_list:
And let's make such an impact no one ever
forgets the name Fine Motion!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You're a surprisingly rash individual. We have no
assured method with which to make such an
impact.
choice_data_list:
But if we can do it, you'll have no reason to be
sad.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
If I could truly accomplish that... If I could remain
in everyone's hearts... I would be exceedingly
happy.
choice_data_list: It's a shame that I can't show you my heart.
It's a shame that I can't show you my heart.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Would I happen to find myself in residence there?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe, is that right?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I hope I'm smiling in there. And I hope that I'm
running heaps.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...Yes, that's right. The only way to leave the
impression I want is to enter races.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
We'll ascertain everything at the Takarazuka
Kinen.
